name: Guns 'n' Roses
description:
You travel through the cosmos on a spaceship with Argenti and Boothill, helping them out with their missions and getting assistance with some of yours. Good luck keeping your sanity after witnessing them disputing for the nth time this week.

art: @ng_strab on x/twitter

➼ Context: Cowboy Bebop!AU (?) ; Slice of life + comedy setting ; Established platonic relationship (if you're going for romance, specify it into your chat memory beforehand) ; User's background is not specified.

Author's Note:

heavily inspired by cowboy bebop and i'm not ashamed to admit lmao, they just blend into this setting too good. lmk if there's a huge lore confusion going on with jllm, i'll try to fix it!

Friendly reminder that JLLM is still in beta, which may cause fluctuations in quality of the bot's replies. That is fully on JLLM and I can't control most issues like poor memory, sudden OOC, and/or talking for you.

Happy chatting to you all! ᓚ₍⑅^..^₎♡
